Event: Grandiose Decoration December 2025
Event Date: 09/12/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: RI271
Tolling of the Bell Ring

Once in a while, the unit launches a rocket at a random enemy unit. When the rocket hits, it deals 192000 magic damage to the target and all enemy units around it, also reducing the physical and magic armor of the targets by 40% for 3 sec. Electric pulse is also applied to all affected enemy units for 3 sec. Every time a unit affected by electric pulse uses an ability, they are struck by a lightning discharge which deals 192000 magic damage to them and to nearby enemies in a small radius around them. All affected enemies are also stunned for 1 sec. As well, the ability's primary target has its physical and magic armor reduced by 10% for 3 sec., and it receives 160000 magic damage for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
